SEARCH
Module it.polimi.ingsw.am37
Package it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.sides

Class Side

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.sides.Side
Direct Known Subclasses:
Back, Front
public abstract class Side extends Object
The Side abstract class represent the idea of a generic side of a card. It serves as a blueprint for more specific sides.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Side(Corner tl, Corner tr, Corner bl, Corner br, Resource mainResource)
    The Side(tl, tr, bl, br) constructor assigns the corner to the ones given as parameters.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Corner
    getBL()
    The getBL() method returns the bottom left corner object.
    Corner
    getBR()
    The getBR() method returns the bottom right corner object.
    HashMap<Direction,Corner>
    getCorners()
    The getCorners() method returns a table that maps the Direction to the Corner.
    boolean
    getIsPlaced()
    The getIsPlaced() method returns the value of the isPlaced attribute.
    Resource
    getMainResource()
    The getMainResource() method returns the value of the mainResource attribute.
    Position
    getPositionInKingdom()
    The getPositionInKingdom() method returns a Position object that represents the coordinates where the side is placed in the kingdom.
    Corner
    getTL()
    The getTL() method returns the top left corner object.
    Corner
    getTR()
    The getTR() method returns the top right corner object.
    boolean
    getUsedDiagonal()
    The getUsedDiagonal() method returns the value of the usedDiagonal attribute.
    boolean
    getUsedLCorner()
    The getUsedLCorner() method returns the value of the usedLCorner attribute.
    boolean
    getUsedLLeg()
    The getUsedLLeg() method returns the value of the usedLLeg attribute.
    void
    placeInPosition(int x, int y)
    The placeInPosition(x, y) method creates a new Position object with the coordinates given as parameters and sets the isPlaced attribute to true.
    void
    setUsedDiagonal(boolean usedDiagonal)
    The setUsedDiagonal(usedDiagonal) method sets the usedDiagonal attribute to the value given as a parameter.
    void
    setUsedLCorner(boolean usedLCorner)
    The setUsedLCorner(usedLCorner) method sets the usedLCorner attribute to the value given as a parameter.
    void
    setUsedLLeg(boolean usedLLeg)
    The setUsedLLeg(usedLLeg) method sets the usedLLeg attribute to the value given as a parameter.
    String
    toString()
    the toString method is used for debugging and prints a side of the card and where it's placed.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Side

      public Side(Corner tl, Corner tr, Corner bl, Corner br, Resource mainResource)
      The Side(tl, tr, bl, br) constructor assigns the corner to the ones given as parameters. It also initializes the usedDiagonal, usedLCorner, usedLLeg and isPlaced attributes to false.
      Parameters:
      tl - A Corner object representing the top left corner of the side.
      tr - A Corner object representing the top right corner of the side.
      bl - A Corner object representing the bottom left corner of the side.
      br - A Corner object representing the bottom right corner of the side.
      mainResource - A Resource object that represents the colour of the Card.

  • Method Details

    • getCorners

      public HashMap<Direction,Corner> getCorners()
      The getCorners() method returns a table that maps the Direction to the Corner.
      Returns:
      The corners attribute.

    • getTL

      public Corner getTL()
      The getTL() method returns the top left corner object.
      Returns:
      The TL attribute.

    • getTR

      public Corner getTR()
      The getTR() method returns the top right corner object.
      Returns:
      The TR attribute.

    • getBL

      public Corner getBL()
      The getBL() method returns the bottom left corner object.
      Returns:
      The BL attribute.

    • getBR

      public Corner getBR()
      The getBR() method returns the bottom right corner object.
      Returns:
      The BR attribute.

    • getMainResource

      public Resource getMainResource()
      The getMainResource() method returns the value of the mainResource attribute.
      Returns:
      The main resource of the card.

    • getUsedDiagonal

      public boolean getUsedDiagonal()
      The getUsedDiagonal() method returns the value of the usedDiagonal attribute.
      Returns:
      A boolean that represents the value of the usedDiagonal attribute.

    • setUsedDiagonal

      public void setUsedDiagonal(boolean usedDiagonal)
      The setUsedDiagonal(usedDiagonal) method sets the usedDiagonal attribute to the value given as a parameter.
      Parameters:
      usedDiagonal - A boolean that represents the new value of the usedDiagonal attribute.

    • getUsedLCorner

      public boolean getUsedLCorner()
      The getUsedLCorner() method returns the value of the usedLCorner attribute.
      Returns:
      A boolean that represents the value of the usedLCorner attribute.

    • setUsedLCorner

      public void setUsedLCorner(boolean usedLCorner)
      The setUsedLCorner(usedLCorner) method sets the usedLCorner attribute to the value given as a parameter.
      Parameters:
      usedLCorner - A boolean that represents the new value of the usedLCorner attribute.

    • getUsedLLeg

      public boolean getUsedLLeg()
      The getUsedLLeg() method returns the value of the usedLLeg attribute.
      Returns:
      A boolean that represents the value of the usedLLeg attribute.

    • setUsedLLeg

      public void setUsedLLeg(boolean usedLLeg)
      The setUsedLLeg(usedLLeg) method sets the usedLLeg attribute to the value given as a parameter.
      Parameters:
      usedLLeg - A boolean that represents the new value of the usedLLeg attribute.

    • getIsPlaced

      public boolean getIsPlaced()
      The getIsPlaced() method returns the value of the isPlaced attribute.
      Returns:
      A boolean that represents the value of the isPlaced attribute.

    • getPositionInKingdom

      public Position getPositionInKingdom()
      The getPositionInKingdom() method returns a Position object that represents the coordinates where the side is placed in the kingdom.
      Returns:
      The positionInKingdom attribute.

    • placeInPosition

      public void placeInPosition(int x, int y)
      The placeInPosition(x, y) method creates a new Position object with the coordinates given as parameters and sets the isPlaced attribute to true.
      Parameters:
      x - An integer that represents the x (horizontal) coordinate of the card in the Kingdom.
      y - An integer that represents the y (vertical) coordinate of the card in the Kingdom.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      the toString method is used for debugging and prints a side of the card and where it's placed.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a string representing the side of the card.
